/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/tests/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/tests/test_json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/tests/test_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/tests/test_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/tests/test_tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/tests/test_llm_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/src/json.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/src/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/src/tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccl_test.dir/src/llm_client.cpp.o -o ccl_test  /usr/lib64/libcurl.so
